zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡下的均线压制格局
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD整体维持弱势震荡结构，报价约6.52附近运行，虽24小时微涨，但仍未摆脱下行后的整理阶段。价格持续受制于6.62一带的SMA20均线压制，短线反弹力度有限，整体趋势偏弱但下行动能有所放缓。

技术指标方面，MACD维持在-0.022附近的负值区域，空头动能仍占优势，但下跌柱体收敛，说明卖压正在减弱。由于RSI缺失无法辅助判断，但结合均线结构来看，市场仍处于弱势整理周期。

支撑与阻力结构清晰，下方关键支撑位集中在6.48-6.50区间，一旦失守可能进一步下探至6.40附近。上方阻力首先看6.62的SMA20，其次6.70构成更强压力区域，突破难度较高。

交易策略上建议维持区间思路，未有效突破6.62前不宜追多，可在接近6.62-6.70区间分批轻仓试空，止损设置在6.70上方，等待方向选择后再跟随趋势操作更稳妥。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently consolidating in a very tight intraday range after a mild 0.57% advance, but the broader short-term structure remains slightly weak. Price is trading below the 20-period SMA at 6.62070, which signals that upside momentum has not yet been confirmed. The market is essentially drifting sideways between 6.4856 and 6.5397, suggesting low conviction from both buyers and sellers.

From an indicator standpoint, the MACD reading of -0.0224 indicates that bearish momentum is still marginally dominant, even if not aggressively expanding. The absence of RSI limits precision in identifying overbought or oversold conditions, but price behavior below the SMA suggests demand is still insufficient to reclaim trend control. Overall momentum remains neutral-to-bearish with no clear reversal confirmation yet.

Key support is located at 6.4856, which aligns closely with the current range low and acts as the immediate defense level. A breakdown below this zone could expose further downside toward the 6.40 area, where buyers may attempt to stabilize price. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 6.62 (SMA20), followed by stronger supply near 6.70 and then 6.80 if momentum improves.

Trading conditions favor patience and confirmation rather than early positioning. Selling into resistance near 6.62–6.70 is preferable while price remains below the SMA20, as trend bias has not shifted bullish. Conversely, a sustained breakout above 6.62 with expanding volume would weaken the bearish case and open room for mean reversion toward higher resistance zones. Risk control remains essential due to compressed volatility.
